raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Frontally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box’s front face is directly reachable; there is free space in the forward direction and the black cup is positioned to the right, not blocking the pushing path.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is translated ~10 cm forward, creating a small gap between it and the lighter box so both lateral faces become accessible."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "darker box",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box now has clearance on both left and right sides; both arms can approach its lateral faces without colliding with the lighter box or the cup.",
    "Postcondition": "The robot securely grips the darker box with both arms and lifts it off the table, successfully picking it up."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box’s front face is directly reachable; there is free space in the forward direction and the black cup is positioned to the right, not blocking the pushing path.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is translated ~10 cm forward, creating a small gap between it and the lighter box so both lateral faces become accessible.

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box now has clearance on both left and right sides; both arms can approach its lateral faces without colliding with the lighter box or the cup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The robot securely grips the darker box with both arms and lifts it off the table, successfully picking it up.
